perks.summary: navigate a browser session to a URL (load a page; first step of any flow)
capture the accessibility/element-ref snapshot of the current page (read-only)
render the current page (or a ref) to a screenshot file (read-only artifact)
render the current page to a PDF file (read-only artifact)
evaluate a JS expression against the page / a ref to extract data (read-only)
dump the page's console messages, optionally filtered by level (read-only)
record a Playwright trace around a flow (tracing-start then tracing-stop; artifact)
